untranslatable_reason: Signal requires specific event-driven data (earnings announcement dates, days-to-earnings countdown, IV percentile ranking vs 1-year history, IV level comparisons) which are NOT available in the allowed indicators list. The signal is fundamentally event-based and requires external event calendar data and IV term structure analysis that cannot be constructed from price/technical indicators alone. Used india_vix as a proxy for volatility regime, but this cannot capture the nuanced pre/post-earnings IV dynamics described in the original signal.
translation_notes: SINCLAIR_DRY_3_0 is an earnings-driven volatility arbitrage strategy (short straddle before earnings, exit post-announcement). Core requirements: (1) Earnings event confirmation, (2) Days-to-earnings threshold, (3) IV percentile ranking, (4) IV spike detection. None of these can be reliably replicated with standard OHLCV indicators. Substituted india_vix as volatility proxy, but this loses the earnings event specificity and IV percentile context that are essential to the strategy.
